opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: FoothillsPlumbing.com is parked for sale with no website, booking tool, or GMB booking button detected.
opportunities.observation: Every after-hours plumbing lead in Boise has nowhere to land and calls a competitor instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget via a new site to capture and confirm appointments 24/7 automatically.

opportunities.label: Call Capture and CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected and no functional website means zero digital lead tracking exists.
opportunities.observation: Every inbound call from 82 Google reviews worth of reputation generates no recorded data or follow-up.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call logging with auto-CRM entry to capture caller info, job type, and outcome every time.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: Foothills Plumbing has 82 Google reviews at 4.6 stars with no website to signal active reputation management.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews from a business with no web presence signal neglected trust-building with Boise customers.
opportunities.fix: Use AI to auto-generate personalized, plumbing-specific Google review responses within hours of posting.
